mnemonics.title: Function Types
mnemonics.content: Injections Inject Individuality, Surjections Surpass Surfaces, Bijections Behave Best

mnemonics.title: Composition Order
mnemonics.content: Function composition works Right-to-Left like Hebrew: f∘g means 'g then f'
